name: textarea
visual_summary: A textarea is a multi-line input field where users can enter and edit large blocks of text. It is often used in forms, articles, and chat windows. This component is useful when developers need users to input text that may be several paragraphs long.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: textarea
Description: A textarea is a multi-line input field where users can enter and edit large blocks of text. It is often used in forms, articles, and chat windows. This component is useful when developers need users to input text that may be several paragraphs long.
Style: plain
Interactions: 
Tags: textbox, longtext, multilineinput

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
